items.title: SSD prices are rough right now, but this 1TB pocket-sized drive is 40% off at $180 today
items.summary: We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops Verbatim’s 1TB Pocket SSD down to $179.99 shipped. This is one of the more budget-friendly drives that typically goes for $300, and it’s available at an even better price today at $120 off. It’s too good to pass up this deal at 40% off, considering the SSD prices are constantly climbing, and good deals are increasingly hard to come by. It’s a great offer for anyone who wants a compact drive for everyday file transfers, backups, and portable storage. Head below for more details.

We’ve previously only seen the blue variant of this speaker briefly drop to the $85 mark, but today’s discounted price is the lowest we tracked for the rest of the finishes. Amazon currently has this speaker listed at $150, and they’ve never dropped below $95 there. It’s rare to see this model discounted in multiple finishes at once, so be sure to grab the color you like while the deal is live.

items.title: HP’s 2026 touchscreen OmniBook X Flip OLED 2-in-1 Copilot+ PC is a great back-to-school deal at $650 off
items.summary: While you can still grab HP’s OmniBook X OLED Copilot+ PC with a Core Ultra X7 processor for $1,400, we just spotted another solid deal on its relatively affordable 2-in-1 variant. Best Buy is offering HP’s OmniBook X Flip 2-in-1 touchscreen OLED laptop for $999.99 shipped. That’s down from its usual price of $1,650, so you’re looking at up to $650 in savings on it today. We’ve seen the standard variant of this 2026 OmniBook laptop go for less, but this is the first time this versatile 2-in-1 model is seeing a steep $650 discounted. It’s a pretty good option to consider if you’re looking to buy a capable Windows notebook, and it would also make for a great back-to-school machine under $1,000.
